hidden_state.goal: Figure out why the production API started returning 500 errors in the last hour
hidden_state.hidden_truth: A team member deployed a config change to the database connection pool 90 minutes ago but hasn't mentioned it to anyone

opening_input: our API is throwing 500s, started about an hour ago, users are complaining
behavioral_rules: Wants immediate answers. Will provide logs and error messages when asked. Gets frustrated if the investigation moves slowly. Has already tried restarting the service (didn't help).
